app.title: Aljeel AP Portal
app.tagline: Self-service invoice submission and payment tracking for suppliers

health.title: API Status
health.error: API unreachable — ensure `pnpm dev` is running (API on port 3002)

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Self-service invoice submission and payment tracking for suppliers
auth.cloudflareSubtitle: Cloudflare Access will verify your email and one-time code before opening the portal.
auth.devSubtitle: Local development — the API signs you in automatically using AUTH_DEV_EMAIL.
auth.accessRequiredBody: Cloudflare Access must verify your email before this portal can load your account.
auth.devAccessRequiredBody: Could not load your dev account. Ensure the API is running with AUTH_DEV_MODE=true and AUTH_DEV_EMAIL set to a seeded user.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track invoices and payment status at a glance
dashboard.noSupplier: Supplier profile not found — run `pnpm --filter @aljeel/api prisma:seed`
dashboard.emptyBody: When you submit your first invoice, it will appear here and move through the pipeline: Draft → Under Review → Approved, or Rejected / On hold if AP needs changes.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: View and manage your submitted invoices
invoices.unfinishedTitle: You have {count, plural, one {# unfinished upload} other {# unfinished uploads}}
invoices.unfinishedHint: Resume a draft to review uploaded files and re-upload the same folder. Already uploaded files will be skipped.

invoiceForm.title: Submit invoice
invoiceForm.subtitle: Upload your invoice and any supporting documents. Details are extracted automatically after submission.
invoiceForm.filesHint: Add all your files in one upload. At least one file is required before submitting.
invoiceForm.filesHintAsateel: Add all your files in one upload. At least one file and two Excel (.xlsx) files are required before submitting. For Asateel suppliers, the spreadsheet Invoice No column must match uploaded attachment file names.
invoiceForm.filesHintJawal: Add all your files in one upload. Include the Jawal travel spreadsheet (Ref.No and Ticket columns) and the evidence folder tree.
invoiceForm.filesDropHint: Every file inside the folder will be listed and uploaded individually.
invoiceForm.unfinishedTitle: You have {count, plural, one {# unfinished upload} other {# unfinished uploads}}
invoiceForm.unfinishedHint: You can resume a draft, see the files already uploaded, and re-upload the same folder to fill in anything missing.
invoiceForm.unfinishedFiles: {count, plural, one {# file uploaded} other {# files uploaded}}

errors.filesRequired: Please attach at least one file before submitting for review
errors.xlsxRequired: Please attach at least two Excel (.xlsx) files before submitting for review
errors.asateelFilesMissing: Missing PDF files for invoice numbers: {numbers}
errors.asateelFilesExtra: These files are not listed in the spreadsheet Invoice No column: {files}
errors.asateelTableRequired: Upload a spreadsheet with an Invoice No column (Asateel shipping report).
errors.asateelTableEmpty: The spreadsheet has no invoice numbers in the Invoice No column.
errors.asateelRegionRequired: Please select an Asateel region before submitting for review
errors.jawalTableRequired: Upload a Jawal travel spreadsheet with Ref.No and Ticket columns, plus the evidence folder tree.
errors.jawalTableEmpty: The Jawal spreadsheet has Ref.No / Ticket headers but no line items.
errors.jawalApprovalMissing: Approval evidence missing — event/sponsorship lines need an OPEX form; travel lines need a .msg thread or OPEX.
errors.jawalOrphanFolder: Evidence folders not listed on the spreadsheet: {folders}
errors.invoiceNumberTaken: An invoice folder named "{name}" was already submitted. Resume the existing draft or rename the folder.
errors.invoiceNumberTakenGeneric: This invoice folder name was already submitted.

invoiceDetail.documentsHint: Click a file to preview it inline
invoiceDetail.documentsDraftHint: Re-select or drag the same folder here to continue. Already uploaded files are detected and skipped so only missing files upload.
invoiceDetail.documentsRenameHint: Click a file to preview it. Rename evidence paths if a folder or file name does not match the spreadsheet — only before you submit.
invoiceDetail.documentsApEditHint: You can upload missing files, rename paths, or remove files in this invoice folder.
invoiceDetail.filesRequired: Please attach at least one file before submitting for review
invoiceDetail.xlsxRequired: Please attach at least two Excel (.xlsx) files before submitting for review
invoiceDetail.invoicePreviewMissing: No invoice PDF attached yet. Upload one in the attachments section below.
invoiceDetail.invoicePreviewError: Could not load the invoice PDF

documents.title: Attachments
documents.subtitle: Supporting documents such as delivery notes, GRN copies, contracts, or timesheets.
documents.formHint: Upload the original invoice (PDF) and any supporting files. They will be attached when you save.
documents.dropTitle: Drag & drop files here, or choose files below
documents.dropHintFolderFirst: Use Choose folder to upload a whole folder. Nested files are included automatically.
documents.dropActiveFolder: Drop files here — for whole folders, use Choose folder
documents.folderUseBrowse: Could not read that folder. Click Choose folder instead.
documents.folderScanEmpty: Could not read files from that folder. Try Choose folder again.
documents.folderScanError: Could not read the folder. Try Choose folder again.
documents.viewerUnsupported: Preview not available for this file type

apReview.title: AP review queue
apReview.subtitle: Invoices awaiting review or on hold
apReview.empty: No invoices need review right now
apReview.selectHint: Select an invoice from the queue to review
apReview.evidenceHint: Click a file to preview it inline — no download required
